content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

The failure reconciliation implementation is well-structured and correct. It faithfully follows the success_reconciliation.rs pattern, properly records failed attempts in journal/lineage state, leaves beads open for retry, counts attempts accurately, escalates to NeedsOperator after MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES (3), and handles idempotency and stale replay scenarios. The code integrates cleanly at both the daemon loop and CLI sync layers. All 8 failure_reconciliation unit tests and all 21 sync_terminal_milestone_task tests pass. Clippy (with -D warnings) and fmt checks are clean. No critical, high, or medium issues found.

## Amendments

None.
